title: arctium lappa subsp. majus
intro: Arctium lappa subsp. majus, also known as the greater burdock, is a biennial plant that belongs to the dandelion and thistle family, native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Arctium lappa subsp. majus include reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as its potential to inhibit cancer cell growth and lower cholesterol levels. Arctium lappa subsp. majus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, capsules, and infusions, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy for various health conditions.
